transcription.text: I'm Mr. Wonderful from Shark Tank. When Blueland asked me to clean a toilet on TV, I said, are you joking? But here I am because Blueland is serious about saving you money. Stop paying for wasteful plastic bottles. With Blueland, you only need to buy one. Easily clean anything around your house. Your vault, portraits of your ancestors, and at $2 a tablet, you're set for life. And so am I, because I get a royalty. Get your kit now at Blueland.com. Smells like a D.
